His Servants, the Prophets By Elder F. Michael Watson Of the Seventy The Master speaks to us through His prophet. During my growing-up years in the small farming community of Spring City, Utah, an opportunity afforded…
And he said, The Lord is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer;
Presently Captain-Lieutenant Orloff jerked the port-hand yoke-line. His keen eyes had discerned the outlines of the lighthouse on the eastern extremity of the island fortress.
The Lord is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my strength, in whom I will trust; my buckler, and the horn of my salvation, and my high tower.
For thou art my rock and my fortress; therefore for thy name’s sake lead me, and guide me.
